commit.message:
Use attention instead of hard coding items/enemies/projectiles (#174)

* Unified entity attention: replace separate enemy/item/projectile arrays with transformer self-attention

Replace three separate fixed-size entity arrays (enemies 4×6, items 2×4, projectiles 2×5) with a unified 12-slot entity list processed by self-attention. Each entity gets a 9-dim feature vector (presence, position, direction, health, stun, hurts_on_touch, killable) plus a learned type embedding for ~74 entity types.

Architecture changes:
- EntityAttentionEncoder: type embedding (8-dim) + linear projection + 1-layer TransformerEncoder (4 heads, ff=128) + mean pooling
- CombinedExtractor: image CNN (256) + entity attention (64) + boolean info (15)
- Handles all-empty entity slots gracefully (unmask dummy token to prevent NaN softmax)

Observation changes:
- Unified entities (12×9) and entity_types (MultiDiscrete) replace enemy_features/item_features/projectile_features
- Clock item support: sets enemy hurts_on_touch=0, stun=1.0 when active
- Added has_clock boolean (index 14), kept full_health (index 13)

Also updates:
- Debugger observation panel: entity list widget replacing vector circle grid
- Rollout buffer: MultiDiscrete observation support
- All tests updated and passing (678 pass)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix empty action mask crash: safety fallback + rich diagnostics

When Link is stuck (can_link_move returns False for all directions) AND
no enemies/items are present (sword/beams disabled), the flat action mask
can end up all-False. In multihead mode this produces an all-False action
type mask, causing a crash in Categorical distribution.

Fix:
- action_space.py: if flat mask is entirely empty, force-enable all MOVE
  directions as a safety valve so the agent can always act
- models.py: replace bare assert with ValueError that includes full mask
  values, action type mask, direction mask, and action space config for
  easier debugging if this ever triggers again

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Replace safety fallback with diagnostic crash on empty action mask

Link should always have at least one valid move direction. An empty mask
indicates a bug in can_link_move or tile walkability, not a normal edge
case to paper over. The RuntimeError now dumps: location, position, tile,
link status, per-direction can_link_move results, actions_possible,
invalid_actions from training hints, enemy/item counts, and the full flat
mask. The models.py ValueError also includes the obs info vector.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add GAE checkbox to debugger toolbar (off by default)

The GAE advantage recomputation was running on every step, slowing down
the debugger. Add a 'GAE' checkbox to the toolbar that controls whether
advantages are calculated. When unchecked (default), the Advantage column
is empty and no computation happens. Toggling on recomputes immediately;
toggling off clears all advantage values. The γ/λ spinboxes still trigger
recomputation only when GAE is enabled.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Worktree/costs in card effects (#33)

* refactor: use add_card return value instead of lib.cards.len()

Replace `let id = lib.cards.len(); lib.add_card(...)` with
`let id = lib.add_card(...)` across all 6 discipline files (71 occurrences).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: add costs field to FishingValue, WoodcuttingChop, HerbalismMatch, CraftingReduction

Add costs: Vec<CardEffectCost> to the four discipline-specific CardEffectKind
variants (matching GainTokens/LoseTokens pattern). Update roll_concrete_effect
to roll costs for all variants via shared roll_costs helper. All existing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* BREAKING: move fishing costs into CardEffectKind templates

Move durability/stamina/health costs from separate apply_fishing_costs()
post-processing into CardEffectCost entries on FishingValue and GainTokens
templates. Costs now scale with the effect's rolled value (mining pattern)
instead of being flat absolute amounts.

- Add 6 cost-bearing templates (3 FishingValue tiers × cost combos + stamina gain)
- Remove compute_fishing_card_value, apply_fishing_costs helpers
- Remove 3 dead cost entries (durability/stamina/health LoseTokens)
- Restructure modifier-only cards to include FishingValue as first effect
- card_value no longer set on fishing ConcreteEffects

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: add is_absolute flag to CardEffectCost and ConcreteEffectCost

Support absolute cost values (not percentage-based) for effects with
zero or small rolled_values (HerbalismMatch, WoodcuttingChop, etc.).

When is_absolute is true, the rolled min/max values are used directly
as cost amounts instead of being multiplied by the effect's rolled_value.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* BREAKING: move herbalism costs into CardEffectKind templates

Move absolute costs from separate apply_herbalism_costs() calls into
HerbalismMatch templates using is_absolute: true. Costs are now rolled
by roll_concrete_effect() automatically.

Remove compute_herbalism_card_value, apply_herbalism_costs helpers,
and 3 dead cost entries (_durability_cost_id, _stamina_cost_id,
_health_cost_id).

Card compositions simplified: no more manual cost variables or
apply_herbalism_costs calls.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* BREAKING: move woodcutting costs into CardEffectKind templates

Move absolute costs from separate apply_woodcutting_costs() calls into
WoodcuttingChop and GainTokens templates using is_absolute: true.

Create 10 cost-bearing template variants for different (chop_type,
cost_combination) pairs. Original templates kept for non-first effect
positions in multi-effect cards.

Remove compute_woodcutting_card_value, apply_woodcutting_costs helpers,
3 dead cost entries, and inline rest card cost block.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* BREAKING: move crafting costs into CardEffectKind templates

Move absolute costs from separate apply_crafting_costs() calls into
CraftingReduction templates using is_absolute: true.

Create 2 cost-bearing ore reduction variants (stam, health).
Remove compute_crafting_card_value, apply_crafting_costs helpers,
and 2 dead cost entries.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* BREAKING: move rest_token_cost into CardEffectKind templates

Remove rest_token_cost field from CardKind::Rest, replacing it with
a RestToken CardEffectCost (is_absolute: true) on the 4 templates
that cost 1 rest token. Mixed (free) templates have no RestToken cost.

Add RestToken variant to TokenType with is_encounter_scoped() method.
Refactor check_and_deduct_costs/preview_costs to use
extract_gathering_costs_from_effects (fixing is_absolute handling)
and filter out encounter-scoped costs.

Add extract_rest_token_cost() helper for encounter resolution.

BREAKING: remove target from LoseTokens, convert OnSelf costs to rolled_costs (#30)

Remove the `target` field from `CardEffectKind::LoseTokens` — LoseTokens
always implicitly targets the opponent. Add `card_value: Option<i64>` to
`ConcreteEffect` for transparent cost calculation.

Convert all LoseTokens(OnSelf) cost patterns across 5 gathering disciplines
(mining, woodcutting, crafting, fishing, herbalism) to use the rolled_costs
model on benefit effects. Each discipline now computes a card_value from its
benefit effects and stores costs as percentages of that value.

Key changes:
- types.rs: Remove target from LoseTokens variant; add card_value to ConcreteEffect
- game_state.rs: Rewrite extract_gathering_costs_from_effects to read rolled_costs;
  update check_and_deduct_costs/preview_costs to use card_value

fix: prevent locale switch from overwriting translation content

Root cause: when handleLocaleChange calls applySnapshot (updating
activeTranslationId state) followed by replaceEditorQuery (updating
URL via router.replace), they commit on different React renders.
During the intermediate render the translation-loading effect fires
with the stale URL param and reloads the OLD translation, overwriting
the content that was just applied.

Fixes:
- Guard translation-loading effect with prevTranslationParamRef so it
  only reacts to actual URL changes, not to other dep updates where
  the URL hasn't caught up yet
- Add localeSwitchingRef mutex to prevent concurrent handleLocaleChange
  executions from racing
- Disable all locale buttons (not just the pending one) while a switch
  is in progress
- Clear saveTimerRef in applySnapshot to cancel stale auto-save timers
  from the previous locale

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix 'Could not load artworks' crash: defensive data loading

Root cause: FirestoreArtworkService._collection was eagerly initialized,
crashing if Firebase init failed. This propagated through the provider
chain since ref.watch(artworkApiServiceProvider) was outside try-catch.

Fixes:
- Make _collection lazy in FirestoreArtworkService
- Wrap ref.watch(artworkApiServiceProvider) in try-catch in all providers
- Add direct LocalArtworkService fallback bypassing provider chain
- Now: Firestore fail → API service fail → local JSON → Hive cache → empty

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
